chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Appointed Times for Entering Ihram

text: 2530 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنْ رَجُلٍ مَنْزِلُهُ خَلْفَ اَلْجُحْفَةِ مِنْ أَيْنَ يُحْرِمُ قَالَ «مِنْ مَنْزِلِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2530 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about a man whose home is beyond Al-Juhfa: "From where should he assume Ihram?"
Imam (as) replied: "From his home."
